title: DL Mini-Project: Image Classifier with Streamlit Demo
content:
### Day 161: DL Mini-Project: Image Classifier with Streamlit Demo

CNNs are the backbone of computer vision — image classification, object detection, and segmentation.

**Key Concepts:**

- Connect to real-world applications
- Think about how this would be tested in an interview
